name: Ki Banu Punia Da
overview: Twist after twist arises when a couple, Rajveer and Harman, deceives their father, Balwant Singh Punia, to believe they have become parents. What will happen when the truth comes out?

trailers.title: Ki Banu Punia Da | Trailer | Jaswinder Bhalla | Babbal Rai | Smeep Kang | Releasing on 12th March
